hero.title: Between the Image and the Answer.
hero.summary: I'm a Computer Vision and Machine Learning engineer with {years, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} of industry experience building software for healthcare. I'm currently finishing an Erasmus Mundus Joint Master's in Imaging across Politecnico di Milano and Tampere University, focused on image modelling and data-intensive imaging.
signals.title: At a glance
signals.education.title: MSc Imaging
signals.education.body: Erasmus Mundus, Politecnico di Milano & Tampere University.
signals.industry.title: 3 years at Optum
signals.industry.body: C# / .NET healthcare data platforms serving US medical professionals.
signals.research.title: IEEE MysuruCon 2021
signals.research.body: Attention-based context reduction for RNN question-answering.
focus.title: What I work on
focus.intro: The intersection of pixels, geometry, and learned models. Ordered from most-hands-on to most-curious.
focus.items.cv.title: Computer vision
focus.items.cv.body: Image segmentation, feature extraction, 3D reconstruction, epipolar geometry, OpenCV pipelines.
focus.items.ml.title: Machine learning
focus.items.ml.body: Neural networks in PyTorch and TensorFlow, from tabular models to pixel-level classifiers.
focus.items.systems.title: Software systems
focus.items.systems.body: Backends in C# / .NET and Java. Comfortable across the stack; happier close to the model.
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.body: Looking for a Computer Vision or ML Engineering role. Available for interviews anywhere in the EU, remote elsewhere.
